name: pagecast
description: Preview local HTML reports and publish durable public URLs to your own Cloudflare Pages account.

scripts.build: pnpm -C web install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts && pnpm -C web run build
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/markdown.js
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run check && npm test
